Two Triceratops bulls lock horns in a dusty riverbed, their massive frills scraping as muscles strain and gravel sprays outward.
Styracosaurus males clash horn-first in prairie grass, their weight cracking dry earth while smaller herbivores flee the trembling ground.
A pair of Pachyrhinosaurus charge head-on across tundra scrubland, their boss-plated skulls colliding with echoes that scatter ptarmigan skyward.
Torosaurus rivals push frill-to-frill near a waterhole, dust billowing around their feet as neck muscles bulge beneath striped hide.
Young Pentaceratops challenges a scarred elder, horns lowered in flowering meadow as dragonflies burst upward from disturbed vegetation.
Two Carnotaurus males circle with heads low, bobbing threat displays, their tiny arms tucked as morning mist swirls around talons.
Allosaurus adults face off over canyon territory, jaws gaping wide in roaring displays while rock doves explode from cliffsides.
Rival Ceratosaurus snap and feint near a carcass border, neither engaging fully, their nasal horns catching harsh noon sunlight.
A scarred Tyrannosaurus rumbles warnings at an approaching younger male, footfalls shaking loose leaves from trembling conifers overhead.
Two Albertosaurus circle in autumn forest, their threat calls resonating through trees as a watching female observes from elevated ground.
Pachycephalosaurus rams echo across a mountain ridge, two dome-headed males repeatedly clashing while loose stones tumble down scree slopes.
Stygimoloch juveniles practice dominance on rocky outcrop, their spiked skulls cracking together as parent watches from nearby fossil bed.
Prenocephale bulls meet on highland plateau, their thick skulls impacting with reports that send marmots diving into burrow systems.
Two Dracorex face off at forest edge, bobbing spiked heads before charging across moss-covered stones that scatter underfoot.
Homalocephale males engage in shoving match on riverbank, their flatter skulls pressed together as muddy water churns around feet.
Male Parasaurolophus inflate throat sacs and bellow across misty valley while a receptive female grazes near cycad groves downslope.
Two Lambeosaurus bulls trumpet through resonating crests at lake's edge, their calls vibrating across water as egrets take flight.
Rival Corythosaurus display brilliant head crests and boom territorial calls, their reflections shimmering in a shallow breeding pool.
A young Edmontosaurus male approaches the herd alpha, both rearing slightly and pushing with their broad shoulders near riverbank.
Ouranosaurus males fan their sail-backs and circle near oasis palms, their vivid display colors intensifying as temperature rises.
Two Giganotosaurus roar across a dry creekbed boundary, their massive heads swinging side-to-side in threat while vultures circle above.
Spinosaurus rivals face each other at river junction, sails fully extended and jaws agape, neither crossing the territorial waterline.
Carcharodontosaurus males pace parallel paths in scrubland, rumbling growls causing grazing hadrosaurs to stampede toward distant hills.
A battle-worn Acrocanthosaurus warns a challenger from his hunting grounds, both predators' footfalls cracking sun-baked clay beneath them.
Two Baryonyx snap jaws over a fishing stream, their crocodilian snouts clacking as disturbed fish flash silver in shallow water.
Male Ankylosaurus swing their heavy tail clubs in wide arcs, the bone masses whistling through air as a female watches.
Two Euoplocephalus face sideways, displaying armored flanks and threatening with raised tail weapons near a established nesting ground.
Saichania bulls lower their heads and swing clubs experimentally, dust rising from impacts against canyon wall during territorial display.
Rival Pinacosaurus clash armor-plated sides together with hollow thuds, their tail clubs held ready near a desert water source.
Young Tarchia approaches dominant male, both ankylosaurs circling slowly as their osteoderms scrape and ground squirrels scatter frantically.
Two Stegosaurus swing thagomizer tails in warning arcs, the spiked weapons slicing air near redwood grove as ferns tremble below.
Kentrosaurus males display their shoulder spikes and lash tails, the threatening swings sending smaller dinosaurs fleeing through undergrowth.
Rival Miragaia face each other with elongated neck plates raised, tails swaying defensively near coastal cliffs as seabirds wheel overhead.
Two Hesperosaurus bulls stomp and swing their tail weapons, each impact against fallen logs sending bark fragments flying outward.
A young Dacentrurus challenges for territory, both stegosaurs' tail spikes catching sunlight during ritualized side-to-side threat displays.
Diplodocus males rear on hind legs, their long necks intertwining as they push for dominance while the ground quakes.
Two Brachiosaurus bulls stretch necks upward in height competition, their calls resonating through rib cages as canopy leaves shower down.
Rival Camarasaurus lock necks and shove near a salt lick, their massive bodies grinding together as smaller animals scatter.
A challenger Apatosaurus swings his whip-tail near the alpha's flank, the supersonic crack echoing across the Jurassic floodplain.
Two Mamenchisaurus bulls intertwine impossibly long necks, their bodies pivoting slowly in a test of strength beside misty lake.
Suchomimus face off at waterway intersection, their crocodilian jaws snapping as fish leap frantically in the disturbed shallows below.
Two Utahraptor males circle with killing claws raised, hissing and feinting near nesting territory as a female observes their displays.
Rival Deinonychus screech and leap sideways in threat display, their sickle claws flashing while prairie grass flattens in backwash.
A Therizinosaurus swipes massive claws through air, warning another away from berry thicket as leaves and branches rain downward.
Two Protoceratops males lock beaks and push horn-to-horn in sandy basin, their churning feet creating dust clouds visible for miles.
Rival Iguanodon bulls rear and grapple with thumb spikes extended, their bipedal stance precarious on rain-slicked forest slope.
A young Maiasaura challenges the nesting colony's dominant male, both hadrosaurs bellowing as nearby mothers shield eggs protectively.
Two Dilophosaurus bob crested heads and hiss warnings across a territory line, their colorful neck frills flaring in dawn light.
Megalosaurus rivals pace and roar at woodland clearing's edge, each refusing to retreat as autumn leaves swirl between them.
A Chasmosaurus defends her calves from approaching rival male, both ceratopsians lowering horns as youngsters huddle behind mother's frill.
Two Einiosaurus bulls charge through wildflowers, their forward-curved nasal horns interlocking as impact sends shockwaves through nearby aspens, shaking leaves loose.
Rival Centrosaurus males push horn-to-horn at lakeside, their hooked nasal spikes grinding together while herons scatter from disturbed shallows below.
Anchiceratops bulls meet in autumn clearing, frill bosses scraping as they twist necks for leverage, their massive weight cracking frozen ground.
Two Nasutoceratops lock their curved orbital horns near canyon mouth, dust devils swirling around their planted feet as vultures circle overhead.
Young Diabloceratops challenges herd elder, their twin nose horns clashing as the impact echoes off redrock cliffs and lizards flee crevices.
Majungasaurus males snap jaws and circle in rainforest clearing, their rugose skull crests catching filtered light as parrots shriek warnings.
Two Metriacanthosaurus face off across fallen log, roaring with heads tilted back, their territorial screams silencing insect chorus momentarily.

A scarred Monolophosaurus warns intruder from his territory, both predators' head crests flushed dark as ground-nesting birds explode upward.
Two Torvosaurus bulls roar across gorge boundary, their deep bellows resonating through canyon while bats pour from disturbed cave entrance.
Stegoceras males crack domed heads together on clifftop, each impact sending tremors through stone as mountain goats scatter across ledges.
Two Colepiocephale charge across tundra, their thickened skulls colliding with sharp reports that echo across frozen landscape, startling caribou.
Rival Goyocephale bulls shove head-to-head on riverbank, their impacts splashing water as fish dart away from churned sediment clouds.
Wannanosaurus juveniles butt heads experimentally near nesting grounds, their tentative clashes watched by protective parents from elevated boulder.
Two Tylocephale males meet on foggy moorland, domed skulls crashing together as the sound rolls across heath, flushing grouse skyward.
Male Charonosaurus trumpet through elaborate crests across breeding marsh, their dueling calls vibrating reeds as female swims closer to observe.
Two Tsintaosaurus bulls display unicorn-like crests and bellow, their competing calls causing ripples across still pond as dragonflies scatter.
Rival Hypacrosaurus inflate throat pouches and boom resonant warnings, their massive bodies facing off as steam rises from morning-wet ground.
A young Saurolophus approaches dominant male near salt flat, both extending nose crests upward while harsh calls scatter flamingo flocks.
Brachylophosaurus males circle with display colors intensifying, their flat head plates catching light as they vocalize through expanding throat sacs.
Two Mapusaurus roar warnings across grassland boundary, their pack-hunting territory disputed as grazing sauropods stampede toward distant treeline.
Rival Saurophaganax pace parallel in scrubland, their enormous frames casting long shadows as cicadas fall silent during tense standoff.
Tarbosaurus bulls face each other near volcanic field, their territorial roars echoing off steaming vents while ash drifts between combatants.
Two Daspletosaurus circle in burned forest, charred trunks creaking as their heavy footfalls crush blackened undergrowth into powdery ash.
A young Gorgosaurus challenges alpha near river crossing, both tyrannosaurs' roars causing beaver-like mammals to dive into protective burrows.

Two Gastonia bulls clash studded armor together, their spined flanks grinding as territorial dispute churns prairie dust into choking clouds.
Rival Polacanthus swing spiked tails in defensive arcs, the weapons whooshing through coastal air as seagulls veer away shrieking.
Young Hylaeosaurus approaches territory holder, both ankylosaurs lowering armored heads as their cautious movements disturb butterfly clouds from flowers.
Two Minmi face each other near creek bed, their compact armored bodies swinging club-less tails as frogs leap frantically from banks.
Huayangosaurus males lash spiked tails and display shoulder spines, their territorial warnings near bamboo grove scattering primitive birds downslope.
Two Tuojiangosaurus bulls swing thagomizers experimentally, each tail-spike pass whistling through humid air as dragonflies dart between combatants.
Rival Wuerhosaurus display their low-slung back plates and threaten with tail weapons, stomping near riverbed as water buffalo scatter.
Lexovisaurus males face off with raised shoulder spikes, their thagomizer tails held ready as ground squirrels freeze before bolting.
Two Gigantspinosaurus bulls display enlarged shoulder spikes and circle slowly, their intimidating armor catching dappled forest sunlight menacingly.
Argentinosaurus males push massive necks together, their slow-motion shoving match causing seismic tremors as pterosaurs wheel overhead calling alarm.
Two Dreadnoughtus bulls lean weight into each other, their titan bodies grinding together as ancient conifers sway from ground vibrations.
Rival Saltasaurus face each other with armored backs raised, their whip-tails cracking air as smaller sauropods flee the territorial dispute.
Young Paralititan approaches alpha at oasis, both stretching necks upward in height display while palm fronds rain down from impacts.
Two Giraffatitan bulls interlock necks and twist, their enormous frames pivoting as lakeside mud squelches and herons abandon fishing grounds.
Irritator males snap their crocodile-like jaws at stream confluence, their territorial hisses disturbing lungfish in the shallow braided channels.
Two Austroraptor males circle with arms spread, their hunting territory disputed through threat calls that silence evening frog chorus.
Rival Achillobator screech and display killing claws, neither engaging as dust devils swirl around their planted feet in desert standoff.
A Nothronychus waves massive claws at territorial intruder, both therizinosaurs bellowing as disturbed vegetation reveals hidden lizard inhabitants.
Two Leptoceratops males shove beaks together in scrubland, their smaller ceratopsian frames kicking up alkali dust near dried waterhole.
Rival Tenontosaurus rear and grapple with hand claws, their kangaroo-like stance balanced precariously as tail counterweights swing wildly.
A dominant Shantungosaurus bulls younger male from herd, both hadrosaurs' crashing bipedal charges shaking ground as juveniles scatter protectively.
Two Cryolophosaurus bob crested heads across ice field boundary, their Antarctic territory dispute accompanied by aurora-lit breath vapor.
Piatnitzkysaurus rivals pace and snarl at arroyo edge, each predator refusing retreat as wind-blown sand stings their scaled hide.
A Ceratops mother lowers horns at approaching bull, her defensive stance protecting hidden nest as would-be intruder backs cautiously away.

Rival Sinoceratops push frill-to-frill near bamboo forest edge, neck muscles bulging as impact vibrations shower loose leaves onto combatants below.
Zuniceratops males charge across desert hardpan, their curved brow horns catching dawn light as collision sends jackrabbits fleeing toward rocks.
Two Medusaceratops bulls twist frilled heads for leverage at river crossing, muddy water splashing as herons abandon the contested fishing zone.
Young Agujaceratops challenges scarred elder in mesquite thicket, horns lowering as grasshoppers explode upward from crushed vegetation beneath them.
Rajasaurus males circle with rugose skull crests lowered, their guttural roars echoing through monsoon forest as monkeys flee through canopy.

Rival Neovenator snap jaws across tidal flat boundary, neither crossing exposed mudline as wading birds scatter from their threatening roars.
A dominant Sinraptor rumbles at approaching juvenile, both predators' footfalls splashing through shallow stream as trout flash away panicked.
